cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Not in EET compatibility.tbl — EET install will fail unless bypassed with M flag. Mod tp2 has no EET detection.

sum: Adds magical career tomes to BG1 that let you add a kit to any PC or NPC character, enabling normally impossible kit combinations.
no: Adds magical career tomes to BG1 that let you add a kit to any PC or NPC character, enabling normally impossible kit combinations.

co.n: Kit Tomes for BG:EE, EET, BGT and TuTu
Panver's Merchandise -> Panver Sells 2 Tomes per Kit
Tome Locations -> Merchandise Only-> Panver is outside the Friendly Arm Inn
co.no: Panver located outside the Friendly Arm Inn.
